title: 21:17 â June 15, 2021
body_text:
21:17 â June 15, 2021
Updates to ECCX and EMCD Reports and e-Transfer Response Codes
We updated the Interac e-Transfer Settlement, Tracing, and Reports Part to reflect changes to reports and response codes based on the
June 7
and previous related communications.
Changes to the
Interac
e-Transfer transaction limits come into effect on July 8. We will publish a separate update in the Payment Solutions Manual to address those changes.
Electronic Transactions Volume
Interac e-Transfer Settlement, Tracing, and Reports Part
Section 1.1, Overview of
Interac
e-Transfer Settlement, Tracing, and Reports
We updated content to clarify that payees can receive e-Transfers based on their account number.
Section 1.5,
Interac
e-Transfer Settlement, Tracing, and Reports Document Library
We added forms with response codes for the ISO 8583 integration and the ISO 20022 integration.
Section 5.4, Adjustments for
Interac
e-Transfer Transactions
We updated the image of the ECCX report example.
Section 6.2, Tracing
Interac
e-Transfer Transactions in ServiceNow
We updated the image and procedures for the
Interac
e-Transfer Trace Request form in ServiceNow.
Section 7.2, EMCU (e-Transfer Settlement Summary Report)
We added a table describing the elements in the EMCU report.
Section 7.4, ECCX (e-Transfer Failed Transactions Report)
We added an explanation to clarify the change to the Interac reference numbers and updated images of the ECCX report examples.
Section 8.1, Overview of Interac e-Transfer Response Codes
We removed the existing response codes and descriptions. These are now provided in the forms listed in the table below.
